claims.claim_text: セラニーズのエンジニアリングマテリアル事業は、化学と用途をマッチングさせるアプリケーション開発能力により、自動車・電子部品等の産業成長率の2〜3倍の成長を実現できる製品開発力を持つ
claims.evidence_from_transcript: Q3 2015 Q&A (CEO Mark Rohr): 'In auto, we should be able to get 6% to 9% growth off of a 2% to 3% global growth.' / 'In 2014, the overall industry grew 3.1% and our volumes grew about 9% into that industry.' / 'What we can do well is we can talk to a customer in Japan and triangulate with all of their tier suppliers around the world, introducing a new product or a line to go into a bunch of different vehicles. And we do that better than anybody else.'
claims.speaker: CEO (Mark Rohr)

claims.claim_text: 酢酸チェーン（Acetyl Chain）において、リアルタイムバリュープライシングと顧客との関係見直し（スペシャルティ化学会社的アプローチ）により、従来の契約ベースから価格交渉力を回復させた商業モデルの変革力を持つ
claims.evidence_from_transcript: Q4 2014 CEO: 'In 2012, virtually our entire contractual relationships that we had...did not give us the ability to freely negotiate a freely draw pricing. And we've been working hard to change that. We've had good success changing that in parts of the world, but I'd still say we're only about 1/3 of the way there.' / 'we changed our approach to that industry and conducted ourselves...more like a specialty chemicals company. We conducted ourselves a real-time value and real-time pricing.'
claims.speaker: CEO (Mark Rohr)

claims.claim_text: テキサス州クリアレイクに完成した130万トン規模のメタノールプラント（1トンあたり700ドル未満の建設コスト）が、米国最大・最効率・最低コストの製造拠点として、酢酸チェーン全体の垂直統合コスト優位性を構築した
claims.evidence_from_transcript: Q3 2015 CEO: 'We achieved a huge milestone for our corporation in the completion and start-up of the methanol unit in Clear Lake, Texas. We started construction on this plant 21 months ago with an aggressive timeline, and our talented team completed it in record time and impressive capital cost of less than $700 per ton. At 1.3 million tons of capacity, it is the largest, most efficient and we believe the most economical methanol plant in the U.S.'
claims.speaker: CEO (Mark Rohr)

claims.claim_text: セラニーズは酢酸チェーン（酢酸→VA/VAM→PVA→EVA等）の垂直統合と、グローバル生産最適化モデル（パット・ブレア体制）により、市場環境に対して機動的に生産・流通を最適化するプロセス優位性を持つ
claims.evidence_from_transcript: Q3 2015 CEO: 'Our models are really working well for us. The team is out there every day looking for ways to use these global models, particularly in Pat's business. We are just totally tuned to market. So we are looking at every opportunity and making conscious decisions.' / Q4 2014: 'Our results were driven by changing dynamics in the Acetyl Chain, the ability of our materials business to identify, develop and provide specific materials to our customers and strong commercial and manufacturing performance.'
claims.speaker: CEO (Mark Rohr)

claims.claim_text: エンジニアリングマテリアル事業でのポートフォリオ（2コア戦略：マテリアルズ+アセチルチェーン）が、各々異なるサイクル特性を持ちながら全体の収益安定性を高めており、景気サイクルに対する耐性を持つ事業構造を有する
claims.evidence_from_transcript: Q4 2014 CEO: 'These 2 cores, when you look at it from a 2-core perspective and you set aside the chemistry portfolio of individual businesses, there is a lot of combined strength there.' / 'Our results were driven by changing dynamics in the Acetyl Chain, the ability of our materials business to identify, develop and provide specific materials to our customers.' / Record earnings in Q4 2013, Q4 2014.
claims.speaker: CEO (Mark Rohr)

claims.claim_text: セルロースアセテートトウ（酢酸繊維）事業では、スポンドン工場閉鎖（2012年）による業界供給削減後もトップポジションを維持し、顧客が信頼性と品質を最優先する粘着性の高い顧客基盤を持つ
claims.evidence_from_transcript: Q4 2014 CEO: 'consumers really are just about indifferent about tow price. They are extremely concerned about tow reliability and availability...there tends to be even some brand alignment around it to make sure the experience is the same from stick to stick.' / 'Tow quality: all tow is not the same, so there tends to be even some brand alignment around it to make sure the experience is the same from stick to stick.'
claims.speaker: CEO (Mark Rohr)

claims.claim_text: セラニーズは欧州拠点のオランダ法人を通じたタックス最適化（調整後税率20%未満）と、パンヨーロッパ本部での製品フロー最適化により、競合比で税務上の構造的優位性を保有している
claims.evidence_from_transcript: Q4 2014 CFO Chris Jensen: 'The reason it's going down is through some of this work we're doing with our pan-European headquarters in the Netherlands. And in connection with that, it's changing some of the product flows in the company to a more favorable tax jurisdiction. So that's really the biggest part of driving that change on into 2015.' / 'We'll still be less than 20% on the tax rate, the adjusted tax rate.'
claims.speaker: CFO (Chris Jensen)

claims.claim_text: セラニーズのエンジニアリングマテリアル新製品開発（新規製品バイタリティ）により、特定グレードやアプリケーション向けの独自素材を継続的に投入し、単なる汎用化学メーカーとの差別化を実現する製品イノベーション能力を持つ
claims.evidence_from_transcript: Q3 2015 CEO: 'In the Materials section, broadly speaking, we are very confident in our ability to continue to grow that business through our new product introductions and efforts there.' / 'CoolPoly acquisition is giving us some real positive traction in a lot of areas.' / 'We'll share a lot of detail about our new product launches and how we do the math around those and how that correlates to sales revenue that we expect from new products that we introduce.'
claims.speaker: CEO (Mark Rohr)

claims.claim_text: セラニーズは調整後EPSで2014年に26%成長（$5.67）、運営キャッシュフロー9.62億ドルという記録を達成した実行力を背景に、段階的M&A（小型ボルトオン型）と有機成長の組み合わせで継続的価値創造を追求している
claims.evidence_from_transcript: Q4 2014 CEO: '2014 adjusted earnings of $5.67 per share, which reflects 26% growth over the prior year.' / 'Operating cash flow totaled $962 million, setting a record for the company. Consolidated segment income margins increased 240 basis points to 18.6%.' / Q3 2015: 'We have several activities underway...We have a number of nonbinding offers out today on these small deals.'
claims.speaker: CEO (Mark Rohr)

claims.claim_text: 酢酸チェーンにおける米国天然ガス（シェール）コスト優位性を背景とした欧州からの生産集約（欧州工場閉鎖・米国集中）により、米国生産拠点から欧州・アジア市場への輸出競争力を持つ構造的低コストポジションを確立した
claims.evidence_from_transcript: Q4 2014 CFO: 'we have business in Europe, so it's just translation. Probably 2/3 or more of this is revenue-based and the fact that we're now selling a substantial amount of acetyl products in Europe that are produced in the U.S.' / CEO Q4 2014: 'We do size that. MTBE has a reasonable correlation to crude.' / Q3 2015 CEO: 'Methanol running at 100% capacity. At 1.3M ton capacity, largest, most efficient, most economical methanol plant in the U.S.'
claims.speaker: CEO / CFO
